title: Data-file codegen metadata
description: Optional top-level `meta:` block in data yamls. Carries directives that drive codegen.

enum.description: Emit a typed enum derived from a top-level section of the data file.

section.description: Which top-level YAML section to walk. Defaults to the filename.

name_from.description: Dot-path inside each entry to a string that gets slugged into the enum value name (e.g., `name.en`). When set, the YAML key is treated as the integer id.
